page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 64 dedicated physical cores using the AMD EPYC 9T34 processor. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, and there are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with the instance.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and balanced resource density make this instance suitable for enterprise workloads requiring predictable CPU performance. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs positions it as a cost-effective option for workloads that do not require hardware acceleration or high-speed local disk I/O. Appropriate workloads include enterprise applications, web serving, application servers, and general-purpose database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The dedicated core configuration ensures consistent performance without hyperthreading overhead. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for enterprise applications, web serving, and general-purpose database workloads requiring stable, non-shared compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance featuring sixty-four physical cores and balanced memory for predictable enterprise compute workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
